sql_array: CREATE TABLE encrypted_data (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO encrypted_data (id, data) VALUES (1, decrypt(encrypt('test data', 'kaes'), 'kaes'));
UPDATE encrypted_data SET data = decrypt(encrypt('updated data', 'kaes'), 'kaes') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data FROM encrypted_data WHERE data = decrypt(encrypt('test data', 'kaes'), 'kaes');
DELETE FROM encrypted_data WHERE id = 1 AND data = decrypt(encrypt('updated data', 'kaes'), 'kaes');
